name: 11p15_5_mucin_cluster
description: 11p15.5 secreted-mucin gene cluster MUC2 - MUC5AC - MUC5B - MUC6. Tandemly arrayed paralogs with massive PTS/VNTR exons; each gene contains internal hyper-variable tandem repeats and the genes themselves share extensive intergenic SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: Four mucin paralogs in tandem; massive central PTS-VNTR tandem repeats (60-507 bp units, kilobases long) inside each gene; SDs of 10-50 kb at 88-94% identity between paralogs.
